tagline.en: The shortest path to TOPIK. AI finds your weak spots — you repeat only those.
tagline.ko: TOPIK까지 가장 짧은 길. AI가 약점을 찾아내고, 당신은 그것만 반복합니다.

positioning.description: AI-first TOPIK prep focused on weak-spot repetition. Not 'fun' first — 'fast and effective' first, with optional gamification to sustain motivation.

description.en: Mock exams first, tight SRS intervals, aggressive reminders.
description.ko: 모의고사 우선, 짧은 SRS 간격, 적극적 리마인드.

homeGreeting.en: D-{days} until your TOPIK. Let's drill.

subtitle.en: Here for the long run. Keep it fun.

description.en: Streaks and XP first, relaxed SRS, gentle nudges.
description.ko: 스트릭·XP 우선, 여유로운 SRS, 부드러운 독려.

homeGreeting.en: Day {streak} of your Korean journey. Keep shining.

description.en: Equal mix of mocks, streaks, and weak-spot review.

homeGreeting.en: Ready to level up? We'll balance drills and discovery.
homeGreeting.ko: 레벨업 준비됐나요? 연습과 탐구의 균형을 맞춰드릴게요.
